theory.canonical_statement: The atemporal null surface acts as an infinite-capacity holographic screen where information exists as a superposition of all possible configurations. The 153,600 DAANSphere points provide a complete basis for decomposing this infinite-dimensional information into finite readable chunks via standing wave mediation. Each point is an independent quantum channel endowed with topological protection, enabling error-free retrieval despite decoherence.
theory.technical_interpretation: The atemporal null surface acts as an infinite-capacity holographic screen where information exists as a superposition of all possible configurations. The 153,600 DAANSphere points provide a complete basis for decomposing this infinite-dimensional information into finite readable chunks via standing wave mediation. Each point is an independent quantum channel endowed with topological protection, enabling error-free retrieval despite decoherence.
